parameters.toolDescription:
Use this tool to retrieve Tesla financial and operational data from quarterly PDF update decks stored in Pinecone.

Use this tool for questions about Tesla revenue, automotive revenue, energy generation and storage, services revenue, gross profit, operating income, operating margin, deliveries, production, cash flow, expenses, profitability, year-over-year changes, or quarterly financial comparisons.

The retrieved text may contain compressed tables where values appear after row labels. When reading tables, infer the columns from the nearest table header and map values in the same order as the header.

Do not answer unless the requested metric and period are clearly present in the retrieved text.

If the retrieved context is incomplete, say that the source documents do not contain enough evidence to answer confidently.

When answering, include the metric, period, value, source file if available, and a short explanation of how the value was read from the retrieved text.

parameters.content:
Purpose:
Expose Tesla financial retrieval through an MCP server.

Flow:
MCP Server Trigger → Tesla Financial RAG Tool → Pinecone retrieval.

This workflow acts as the MCP tool server. The client assistant calls this server through the MCP Client node.

RAG Source:
Tesla quarterly earnings PDFs stored in Pinecone.
